unsupported_behavior: No user browser profile, history, cookie store, extension data, account state, or browsing data was inspected.

No browser command line, feature flags, profile hash, cache state, update state, sandbox state, site-isolation state, lifecycle state, memory/energy-saver setting, or user-agent policy was captured.
No benchmark suite or local corpus was run in a browser.
No competitor result, ranking, Chrome-class comparison, fastest claim, lower-memory claim, lower-energy claim, compatibility claim, security claim, or production claim is supported.

isolated browser-reported version capture for every compared product
explicit channel and update-state classification before and after each run
profile source and hash plus extension, sync/account, cache, command-line, environment, feature-flag, sandbox, site-isolation, lifecycle, memory-saver, energy-saver, power, and user-agent disclosure
